channel.title: Lecture Notes on MIT OpenCourseWare
channel.description: Recent content in Lecture Notes on MIT OpenCourseWare

item.title: Capital Budgeting Slides 1–36
item.description: This resource contains the information about the practice of capital budgeting.

item.title: Course Summary Slides 1–16
item.description: This resource contains the slides for the course summary.

item.title: Efficient Market Slides 1–26
item.description: This resource lists about the powers of observation, and efficient markets.

item.title: Equities Slides 1–23
item.description: This resource contains the information about equities.

item.title: Fixed-Income Securities Slides 1–65
item.description: This resource contains information related fixed-income securities.

item.title: Forward and Futures Contracts Slides 1–32
item.description: This resource contains information related to the dividend discount model, DDM with multiple stage growth, growth opportunities and growth stocks.

item.title: Introduction and Course Overview Slides 1–20
item.description: This resource contains information related to motivation, fundamental challenges of finance, the framework of financial analysis, and six fundamental principles of finance.

item.title: Options Slides 1–30
item.description: This resource contains the information about the motivation, payoff diagrams, payoff tables and option strategies.

item.title: Portfolio Theory Slides 1–46
item.description: This resource contains the information about the Risk analytics and portfolio theory.

item.title: Risk and Return Slides 1–35
item.description: This resource contains the information about the introduction to risk and return.

item.title: The CAPM and APT Slides 1–28
item.description: This resource contains the information about the review of portfolio theory, the capital asset pricing model, the arbitrage pricing theory and implementing the CAPM.
